Blight: Remove infected plant debris to reduce pathogen load.
Apply fungicides during early symptom onset.
Common_Rust: Rotate crops to reduce spore buildup.
Use foliar fungicides if severe infection is observed.
Gray_Leaf_Spot: Improve field airflow to reduce humidity on leaf surfaces.
Apply fungicides when environmental conditions favor disease.
Healthy: Monitor regularly for early signs of disease.
Ensure balanced nutrition to keep plants strong.
